creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
I agree with Gary.  Ports PRs are reporting errors involving ports.  The PR is written against a source build outside of ports.  Maintainers spend a lot of time building the recipe for a successful build.  Issues for user's custom source builds are simply out of scope.

I know it's not the answer you want to hear, but ports is huge and we need to keep issues in scope.
